code:
import io
import string
import list

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn byte_or_zero(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
end

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let b = byte_or_zero(s, i)
    if is_ws(b)
      i = i + 1
    else
      mut j = i + 1
      mut scanning = true
      while scanning and j < n
        let bb = byte_or_zero(s, j)
        if is_ws(bb)
          scanning = false
        else
          j = j + 1
        end
      end
      let tok = string.substring(s, i, j)
      match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(v)
        result = list.push(result, v)
      when None
        ()
      end
      i = j
    end
  end
  result
end

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let nums = parse_ints(line1)

let threshold = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
when Some(v)
  v
when None
  0
end

mut out = ""
mut first = true
for x in nums
  if x > threshold
    if first
      out = "#{x}"
      first = false
    else
      out = "#{out} #{x}"
    end
  end
end

println(out)
